title: Celebrating Joe's century
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Petrus Jacobus van der Merwe -...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Petrus Jacobus van der Merwe - affectionately known as Joe, a nickname given by his grandfather that stuck for life - celebrated his 100th birthday on 24 September.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Petrus Jacobus van der Merwe - affectionately known as Joe, a nickname given by his grandfather that stuck for life - celebrated his 100th birthday on 24 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Born in 1925 on the Elandspruit farm near Lydenburg, Joe has lived through a century of change and challenge. But through it all, one thing remained constant: \"My family!\" he proudly says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A life full of joy","html":"A life full of joy"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Joe's fondest decade was 1958 to 1968, filled with family, camping trips and fishing.","html":"Joe's fondest decade was 1958 to 1968, filled with family, camping trips and fishing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He remembers the joy of his daughters running to greet him at the gate after work - and somehow lifting all four at once. Around the campfires, he played mandolin and mouth organ while his friends joined in with guitars and the piano.","html":"He remembers the joy of his daughters running to greet him at the gate after work - and somehow lifting all four at once. Around the campfires, he played mandolin and mouth organ while his friends joined in with guitars and the piano."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He met his wife, Susanna Elizabeth Ahlers, in the clothing section of the G Scott General Store in Pilgrim's Rest.","html":"He met his wife, Susanna Elizabeth Ahlers, in the clothing section of the G Scott General Store in Pilgrim's Rest."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their lasting bond was built on humour, friendship and family fun. The values he passed to his family - integrity, honesty and love - remain central to his legacy.","html":"Their lasting bond was built on humour, friendship and family fun. The values he passed to his family - integrity, honesty and love - remain central to his legacy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A sudden move and a final drive","html":"A sudden move and a final drive"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In early 2020, just before the Covid-19 lockdown, Joe relocated from Gonubie, East London, to Knysna. Joe packed up and made the trip himself - driving solo one day before the national lockdown began. It was also the last time he ever drove a car. He has lived in Knysna ever since.","html":"In early 2020, just before the Covid-19 lockdown, Joe relocated from Gonubie, East London, to Knysna. Joe packed up and made the trip himself - driving solo one day before the national lockdown began. It was also the last time he ever drove a car. He has lived in Knysna ever since."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Schooling, service and work","html":"Schooling, service and work"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Joe attended Pilgrim's Rest School until Standard Six, then completed his matric at Middelburg High School, where he served as a prefect and lieutenant in the cadets.","html":"Joe attended Pilgrim's Rest School until Standard Six, then completed his matric at Middelburg High School, where he served as a prefect and lieutenant in the cadets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A keen sportsman, he narrowly missed winning the esteemed victor ludorum by just 0.5 points. He also was an avid rugby player.","html":"A keen sportsman, he narrowly missed winning the esteemed victor ludorum by just 0.5 points. He also was an avid rugby player."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During WWII, he joined the Saaf as an instrument technician, working on Dakotas and Venturas in Sudan.","html":"During WWII, he joined the Saaf as an instrument technician, working on Dakotas and Venturas in Sudan."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"After the war, he returned to Pilgrim's Rest, working as a tube mill shiftman before qualifying as a fitter and turner."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He spent 35 years at Cyanamid in Witbank until retirement.","html":"He spent 35 years at Cyanamid in Witbank until retirement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wisdom from a long life","html":"Wisdom from a long life"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Joe's first memory is rabbit hunting with his cousin on his aunt's farm. The moon landing left a lasting impression, and he remains in awe of Dr Chris Barnard's first heart transplant.","html":"Joe's first memory is rabbit hunting with his cousin on his aunt's farm. The moon landing left a lasting impression, and he remains in awe of Dr Chris Barnard's first heart transplant."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He believes moderation and goodwill are keys to a good life.","html":"He believes moderation and goodwill are keys to a good life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"And when asked for his secret to longevity? He smiles and says: \"Keep on breathing!\"","html":"And when asked for his secret to longevity? He smiles and says: \"Keep on breathing!\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
